---
title: "Primitives as Code"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Chapter under construction (v2 draft)

This chapter is being authored in Wave C of the Practitioner Block v2 build. The brief lives in `WIP-distillation/round-3/04-FINAL-ARC-PROPOSAL.md`, section 5.
:::

## Thesis

If markdown that steers an LLM is code (Ch09), then the discipline of shipping it must look like the discipline of shipping any other code: lint, test, version, distribute, audit. This chapter operationalizes the meta-thesis.

## Sections (to be authored)

1. The DevEx gap.
2. Lint your primitives.
3. Test your primitives.
4. Version, distribute, lockfile.
5. Audit and supply-chain hygiene.
